availability.p: © Duke Databank of Documentary Papyri. This work is licensed under a Creative Commons Attribution 3.0 License.

revisionDesc.change: Vote - AcceptText - Accept with Freddie's corrections, implementing his slashes on lin6 as ⲙ\ⲛ/

Vote - AcceptText - Commentary: Where diacritical signs or supralinear strokes above letters are present on the original, these were not recorded in Crum's edition. Since Crum in his later editions did indicate these marks, we have chosen to add them tacitly where access to an image has made this possible. lin2=> ϯ ⲡ<:τριμήσιον=grc|reg|ⲧⲉⲣ3.- ⲙⲏⲥⲉⲟⲛ:> (add space & loanword reg) lin6=> ⲙⲡϭⲱⲗ (delete mu); ⲙ\ⲛ/ (add slashes)

Submit - Added text from the edition. Please check Greek loanwords carefully. ⲡⲇⲓⲕ(ⲟⲛⲟⲥ) should probably be ⲡⲇⲓⲁⲕ(ⲟⲛⲟⲥ) - not quite sure how you want to encode the missing alpha. Also attempted to add all diacritics from the image. Check carefully. The supraline above djandja in lin2 seems clear to me.

div.p: Where diacritical signs or supralinear strokes above letters are present on the original, these were not recorded in Crum's edition. Since Crum in his later editions did indicate these marks, we have chosen to add them tacitly where access to an image has made this possible.

div.ab:
ⲛⲁⲃ ⲃ
ⲏⲗϫⲉ ϯ ⲡτριμήσιονⲧⲉⲣ
ⲙⲏⲥⲉⲟⲛ ⲙⲏⲛⲁ
ⲙⲡⲁⲕⲟⲩϫⲉ ⲙⲡⲣ
ϭⲱ ⲛϣⲟⲩⲧⲁⲁϥ ⲛⲁϥ
ⲧⲁⲁⲥ ⲙⲡϭⲱⲗ ⲙⲛ ⲡⲁ
ⲩⲗⲟⲥ ⲗⲁϣⲛⲓⲟⲩ ϩⲓⲧⲛ ⲧⲉ
ⲣⲃⲟⲩⲛⲟⲩⲟⲥ ⲡδιάκονοςⲇⲓ
ⲕⲟⲛⲟⲥ
